integrity.description: Agent used the Webots GUI to configure the digital twin
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Webots application interface (Scene Tree, Field Editor) rather than just editing a .wbt text file in a text editor or using terminal commands.

integrity.visual_evidence: Values like 0.4, 0.3, TRUE, 1 0 0, and 0.002 should be visibly entered into the respective Webots field editor input boxes.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file to the exact requested directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialog or terminal confirmation must explicitly show the Desktop directory (/home/ga/Desktop/) rather than the default Webots project worlds folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/Desktop/cnc_digital_twin.wbt'. The X_LIMITS SliderJoint must have minStop=0.0 and maxStop=0.4.
